title: Encoding Utilities
content:
This module provides utilities for automatically decoding byte strings into text, primarily by checking for Byte Order Marks (BOMs) and PEP 263 encoding declarations. It aims to provide behavior similar to Python's `open()` function for text file handling.

### Key Functions

*   **`auto_decode(data: bytes) -> Text`**:
    Takes a byte string as input and attempts to decode it into a text string. It first checks for known BOMs (UTF-8, UTF-16, UTF-32) and decodes accordingly. If no BOM is found, it inspects the first two lines for an encoding declaration comment (PEP 263). As a final fallback, it uses the system's preferred encoding, mirroring `locale.getpreferredencoding(False)` in Python 3.
